name: Canto

desc: Unit is asleep.

name: Petrify
desc: Unit is petrified. Cannot avoid enemy attacks and suffers -30 dodge.

name: Rescue
desc: Unit is weighed down with a traveler.

name: Void Curse

desc: Grants +1 damage and +1 resist.

name: Devil Luck
desc:
Skill gained by equipping the Devil Axe.
Receives damage equal to damage dealt.

name: Devil Luck
desc:
Skill gained by equipping the Devil Axe.
Receives damage equal to damage dealt.

name: Eclipse Helper
desc:
In order for enemies to use Eclipse, they must think they're inflicting a negative status or dealing damage.
Eclipse doesn't deal damage normally, so instead it secretly inflicts this status.

name: Shove
desc:
Pushes target away from the unit.
(This skill uses the Ability component to link to the Shove item. The Ability component allows this skill to target a unit.)

name: Distance Debuff
desc: Decreases accuracy of status staves based on distance between unit and target.
components: -2 * utils.calculate_distance(unit.position, unit2.position)if unit.position and (utils.calculate_distance(unit.position, unit2.position) > 1) else 0
